title: Faction Zone State
description: Authoritative per-zone Director-AI world-sim state for ONE ground zone. The server owns one instance per zone; this is the persistent, restart-surviving truth the slow Director tick reads and writes. Mirrors SW_MUSH director_ai_design_v1 §3 (zone_influence) + Guide_26 alert levels, recast Clone Wars era and server-authoritative. NOT the territory-org influence table (see territory_claim.schema.json) - different system, different purpose. Bridged only via faction axis for narrative.

source.source_policy: Design schema for standalone Godot server. WEG R&E + Clone Wars era lead; SW_MUSH supplies the Director influence/alert model as reference, not a 1:1 port. Old-era (Imperial/Rebel) labels are recast to Republic/CIS/Hutt/Independent.

zone_id.description: Stable zone key, e.g. 'tatooine.mos_eisley.spaceport'. Matches the zones registry.

influence.description: Per-faction influence score, 0-100, NOT zero-sum (multiple factions can be high). Clone Wars factions. Director slow tick adjusts these; alert_level + security overlay are DERIVED from them every recompute (no LLM needed for derivation).

republic.description: Republic / legitimate authority (Clone Wars analogue of the GCW 'Imperial' axis in the MUSH).

alert_level.description: Derived from influence thresholds at recompute (see WORLD_SIM_DESIGN §Alert Levels). Player-visible tag; drives NPC spawn weights, encounter frequency, economy multipliers. Clone Wars recast of the MUSH's 6 alert levels.

security_base.description: Admin-set base security tier for the zone (the safe-zone <-> consensual-PvP gradient). Director influence/events apply a TRANSIENT overlay on top (see security_overlay); the base value is never overwritten by the sim.

security_overlay.description: Current EFFECTIVE security after Director overlay (influence thresholds + active events). Transient; recomputed each tick; null means 'equals security_base'. e.g. Hutt influence >= 80 downgrades one tier; a republic_crackdown event upgrades contested->secured.

active_events.description: World events currently affecting THIS zone. Each references a world_event_instance by id; the full instance row lives in the world-events store (see PERSISTENCE_DESIGN).

type.description: Fixed-menu event type (the Director SELECTS from this menu, never invents). Clone Wars recast of the MUSH 12-event table.

expires_at_tick.description: Director slow-tick index at which effects reset and the event expires.

ambient.description: Ambient NPC-life + atmospheric-text driver state for this zone. Static pool is data-authored; dynamic pool is OPTIONAL LLM output (see WORLD_SIM_DESIGN §Atmospheric Layer). World stays consistent if the LLM is off.

static_pool_key.description: Key into the authored ambient-line data set for this zone archetype.

dynamic_pool.description: Director-generated atmospheric one-liners for the current cycle. OPTIONAL. Each <= 120 chars, validated, no player names/commands/anachronisms. Empty => 100% static. Drawn 70% static / 30% dynamic when non-empty.

tick.description: Director slow-tick index at which this state was last recomputed. The slow tick (~30s-30min cadence, owner-configurable) is DISTINCT from the 20 Hz movement tick in world_state.gd.

last_recompute_unix.description: Wall-clock epoch seconds of last recompute, for decay timers and admin display.

extra.description: Forward-compat JSON blank (per project convention: every new persisted shape carries an 'extra' object so new fields need zero migration).

active_events.headline: Clone troopers intensify cargo scans at the spaceport.

dynamic_pool: A LAAT/i gunship thunders low over the bays, kicking up grit.
